message.content: 推送并发布到 github pages

content.thinking: The user wants to push the current branch to GitHub and deploy to GitHub Pages. Let me first check the current git status and understand the project setup.

content.text: 先检查当前状态和 GitHub Pages 配置。

input.command: git status --short && echo "---" && git remote -v && echo "---" && git branch -vv
input.description: Check git status, remote, and branch tracking

input.command: cat .github/workflows/*.yml 2>/dev/null || echo "No GitHub workflows found" && echo "---" && grep -r "homepage\|gh-pages\|github\.io" package.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No gh-pages config in package.json"
input.description: Check GitHub Pages and deployment config

content.text:
当前状态：
- 分支 `requirement-to-prototype-demo` 未追踪远程
- 仓库地址：`https://github.com/Divem/ai-devops.git`
- 无 GitHub Pages 部署配置
- 有大量未跟踪的文件（工具配置目录等）

我需要：1) 先提交当前修改 2) 推送分支 3) 构建项目 4) 部署到 GitHub Pages。

questions.question: GitHub Pages 部署方式你想用哪种？

options.label: gh-pages 分支 (推荐)
options.description: 使用 gh-pages 包将构建产物推送到 gh-pages 分支，适合纯前端项目

options.label: GitHub Actions workflow
options.description: 创建 .github/workflows/deploy.yml 自动部署，每次推送自动触发

options.label: 仅推送分支
options.description: 只推送当前分支到 GitHub，不配置 GitHub Pages

content.content: User has answered your questions: "GitHub Pages 部署方式你想用哪种？"="GitHub Actions workflow". You can now continue with the user's answers in mind.

content.text:
好，使用 GitHub Actions 自动部署。我来完成以下步骤：

1. 配置 Vite 的 base path
2. 创建 GitHub Actions workflow
3. 提交并推送

content.content: Directory does not exist
(Bash completed with no output)

content.text: 现在更新 Vite 配置和创建 workflow。

input.content:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, requirement-to-prototype-demo]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: pm-ai-app/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm run build

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: pm-ai-app/dist

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

toolUseResult.content:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, requirement-to-prototype-demo]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: pm-ai-app/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm run build

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: pm-ai-app/dist

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

input.description: Enable GitHub Pages with workflow source

content.text:
GitHub 当前计划不支持 GitHub Pages（免费账户的公开仓库才支持）。你的仓库可能是 **私有仓库**，免费计划下私有仓库无法使用 GitHub Pages。

有两个选择：

1. **将仓库改为公开** — 免费计划下公开仓库可以使用 GitHub Pages
2. **升级 GitHub Pro** — 私有仓库也能用 GitHub Pages

Workflow 文件已创建并推送成功，如果之后你将仓库设为公开，只需去仓库 Settings → Pages → Source 选择 "GitHub Actions" 即可自动部署。

要我把仓库改为公开吗？

content.text: `package-lock.json` 在 `.gitignore` 中被排除了。移除 workflow 中的 cache 配置即可。

input.old_string:
- uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: pm-ai-app/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm ci
input.new_string:
- uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm install

content.content: The file /Users/dawinyuan/Documents/coder/agentic_coding_platform/.github/workflows/deploy.yml has been updated successfully.

toolUseResult.oldString:
- uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: pm-ai-app/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm ci
toolUseResult.newString:
- uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm install
toolUseResult.originalFile:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, requirement-to-prototype-demo]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: pm-ai-app/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm run build

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: pm-ai-app/dist

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

input.command:
git add .github/workflows/deploy.yml && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ci): 移除 npm cache 配置，使用 npm install 替代 npm ci

package-lock.json 在 .gitignore 中，导致 setup-node 缓存失败

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push
